Cari member bank deploys its own CDA contract and a CariSettlement adapter.         Inter-bank transfers use a burn-at-source / mint-at-destination pattern         coordinated through this interface.         SECURITY GUARDIAN NOTE: Cross-bank settlement messages MUST be         authenticated via the Cari Network validator set. The settlement         operator key requires HSM storage with multi-party authorization. executeSettlement(bytes32).details: Called by the Cari Network settlement operator after validating the request.

params.beneficiary: Receiver's wallet address on the destination bank.
params.destinationBank: Cari member bank address to receive tokens.
params.originator: Sender's wallet address on the source bank.
params.travelRuleHash: Keccak256 hash of the Travel Rule metadata payload.

params.entries: Array of net positions per bank

params.closesAt: Timestamp when the window closes (typically end of business day)

returns.windowId: The ID of the newly opened window

closeSettlementWindow(uint256).notice: Close a settlement window, preventing new settlements from being added.

executeSettlement(bytes32).notice: Execute a settlement: mints CDA at the destination bank.

getSettlement(bytes32).notice: Query a settlement request by ID.

initiateSettlement(address,address,addre.notice: Initiate a cross-bank CDA transfer: burns tokens at source, creates settlement request.

netSettle(uint256,(address,int256)[]).notice: Execute net settlement for all banks in a closed window.

openSettlementWindow(uint256).notice: Open a new daily settlement window for aggregating interbank CDA transfers.

revertSettlement(bytes32,string).notice: Revert a settlement: re-mints CDA at the source bank.
